'''Tangrene''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Morshdine sector/Legends|Morshdine sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Description==
Tangrene was a craggy [[Mountain/Legends|mountainous]] world, almost completely devoid of surface vegetation and [[Water/Legends|water]]. The [[Local day/Legends|local day]] lasted 29 [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]]; the [[local year]] 356 [[Standard day/Legends|standard days]]. [[Tangrene (species)|Tangrene indigenous species]] were peaceful nomads.<ref name="TLCSb" />

==History==
{{Quote|Tangrene was our real crowning achievement. We blasted a major Ubiqtorate center into fine powder. And then waltzed out right under the collective nose of the three Star Destroyers that were supposed to be guarding the place.|[[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]|<ref name="DFR">''[[Dark Force Rising]]''</ref>}}
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Tangrene was located deep and secured within the borders [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] space.<ref name="TEA" />

The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] made Tangrene one of its most heavily defended [[Fortress world/Legends|fortress worlds]]. It was defended by two [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] and from ten to fifty other smaller ships, ranging from small [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class]] [[cruiser]]s to big [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]]. Fifteen Imperial [[Garrison/Legends|garrisons]] were scattered throughout the planet. The indigenous species was [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] by Imperial forces and forced to help construct the Imperial fortifications. They were eventually wiped out by the local [[Unidentified Moff (Morshdine sector)|Moff]] to avoid any risk of insurrection.<ref name="TLCSb" /> It was the location of an Imperial [[Ubiqtorate/Legends|Ubiqtorate]] center [[Raid on Tangrene|attacked]] by [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] after his split with [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]].<ref name="DFR" /> During the last stages of the [[Thrawn campaign]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] intended to fool the Imperial forces by sending a fleet at Tangrene while he [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|attacked]] the [[Bilbringi Shipyards]]. However, [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] accurately predicted that Bilbringi was the true target.<ref name="TLC">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>

Tangrene was attacked and conquered by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] around [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] as they swept through the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="TEA" />
